content.headline: Welcome to Your Journey
content.body: Today marks the beginning of your transformation. You've taken the first step by starting this program. Remember, consistency is key to success.
content.mantra: Every journey begins with a single step

content.headline: Pro Tip for Success
content.body: Set a specific time each day for your activities. Whether it's morning or evening, consistency in timing helps build habits faster.

content.mantra: You are capable of amazing things
